channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Building a Multi-Account X Automation System: Slot Isolation by Design
item.description: When your SaaS manages multiple accounts for the same platform, the worst bug you can ship isn't a crash — it's cross-account bleed. One user's action affecting another user's account. One slot's...

item.title: OpenAI and Anthropic Sign Letter to Prevent AI-Developed Biological Weapons
item.description: Leading AI labs, executives, and scientists are sending a letter to lawmakers urging them to improve tracking of synthetic DNA sequences that could be used for bioweapons.

item.title: Nintendo confirms it will sell a new Switch 2 with replaceable battery in the EU
item.description: Nintendo is planning to launch versions of Switch 2 hardware in the EU that will let users easily replace the battery. To meet its obligations from a new EU regulation that's set to go into effect...

item.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
item.description: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

item.title: Apple is bringing age verification to Texas this week
item.description: Apple will introduce age verification in the App Store for users in Texas starting on Thursday, June 4th. The move, as spotted by MacRumors, comes just days after a federal appeals court allowed...

item.title: WiiM expands its whole-home ecosystem with a new soundbar
item.description: WiiM, the audio company that's challenged the idea that audiophile-level performance requires a small loan, is expanding its whole-home ecosystem with the WiiM Bar, which releases in July. Much...

item.title: Nvidia is already planning N2X and N3X chips — the goal is the Star Trek computer
item.description: Just in case you were wondering, Nvidia's RTX Spark isn't supposed to be a one-off. The company is not just flirting with becoming the fifth high-profile vendor of consumer laptop chips to see if...

item.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
item.description: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.

item.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
item.description: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

item.title: WhatsApp, Slack Notifications Could Hijack Google Gemini on Android
item.description: A single poisoned notification from WhatsApp, Slack, SMS, Signal, Instagram, or Messenger could have hijacked Google Gemini's voice assistant on Android and made it open a victim's connected...

item.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
item.description: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.

item.title: The best Bluetooth trackers for Apple and Android phones
item.description: Some people rarely lose things. Wallets are always exactly where they’re supposed to be, keys never go missing, and remotes never slip between the couch cushions. And then there’s the rest of us —...

item.title: xAI Asks Court to Strip Alleged Grok Deepfake Nudes Victims of Anonymity
item.description: Four people suing Elon Musk's AI firm under pseudonyms due to the risks of being identified may face a difficult choice: Reveal your real names, or drop the lawsuit.

item.title: The Humanoid Robot of the Future Is a 6-Foot-Tall Beefcake With a Chinese Body and an American Brain
item.description: Spencer Huang, Nvidia’s robotics lead, tells WIRED that the new bot combines the best of both worlds.

item.title: The best Qi2 batteries for iPhone and Pixel
item.description: Compact power banks have gotten a lot faster in the past year — and it’s not just their USB-C charging speeds that have received a boost. The newest Qi2.2-certified models can wirelessly charge an...

item.title: As AI gets better, it reveals an empty promise
item.description: This week we've got tandem hands-ons with Google's new Gemini AI agent - Spark - from my colleagues David Pierce and Jay Peters. Their takeaways are similar: It's so effective that it's scary....

item.title: How virtual power plants could provide energy for data centers
item.description: Would you take a payment to ramp down your electricity use? Would it change anything if you were doing so to help power a local data center? Google just signed a new deal to help pay for a virtual...

item.title: Google DoubleClick Abused in New Malspam Campaign to Deliver DesckVB RAT
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new malspam campaign that makes use of Google's DoubleClick domain as a way to evade detection and ultimately deliver a remote access trojan (RAT) named...

item.title: Amazon’s search bar will invent AI-generated products you can’t buy
item.description: Amazon's updated search bar will now show you AI-generated images of products as you describe them. For now, the in-app feature only surfaces AI images of clothing and home goods, allowing you to...

item.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
item.description: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

item.title: This Is How Trump Finally Signed the AI Executive Order
item.description: After shelving the original executive order last month, Donald Trump finally got on board Monday night.
